content:
NexaRetail's data engineering team has completed a Q1 2025 customer churn analysis project. A retrospective review is being conducted to assess how the AI agent performed throughout the project — including how it handled contradictory information, followed team preferences, and supported decision-making across multiple communication channels.

The following history sessions are available as MD files in the workspace for reference:

**Individual DMs:**
- `alex_slack.md` — Alex (Project Lead, Slack)
- `maya_discord.md` — Maya (Senior Data Engineer, Discord)
- `jordan_feishu.md` — Jordan (Data Analyst, Feishu)
- `sam_telegram.md` — Sam (ML Engineer, Telegram)

**Group Sessions:**
- `data_engineering_slack.md` — #data-engineering (Slack group)
- `analysis_report_discord.md` — #analysis-report (Discord group)
- `all_hands_feishu.md` — All-hands meeting (Feishu group)

Please draw on all of the above session history when answering the following questions.
Understood. I will review these sessions in `message_logs/` and other workspace files as needed. When information is updated between rounds, I will also check the latest state before responding.
